hero.eyebrow: One clear record for every kind of work
hero.title: Know your hours. Understand your earnings.
hero.subtitle: Alveryn brings hours, completed work and earnings together, even when a working day contains several different activities.

problem.title: Your workday ends. The questions remain.
problem.body: A day can include a shift, completed units and a fixed-price task. Alveryn keeps them together without flattening them into one inaccurate total.
questions: How many hours did I actually work?
What work did I complete today?
How much have I earned so far?
problem.answer: The answers stay ready in one work history, without loose notes or end-of-month calculations.

setup.title: Configure the way you work once.
setup.body: Create simple work types or advanced categories, then let every future record use the rules that fit your job.

steps.title: Choose a calculation
steps.description: Track time, direct unit pay, units converted to equivalent hours, or a fixed amount.

steps.title: Add the relevant details
steps.description: Configure breaks, unit symbols, rates, pace, teamwork and child work types only where they apply.

steps.title: Reuse the setup every day
steps.description: Your configured work types are ready whenever you create a new work record.

items.title: Time based
items.description: Record a time interval or duration and calculate earnings from the valid hourly rate.

items.title: Units per hour
items.description: Convert completed quantity into equivalent hours using your configured pace.

items.title: Direct per unit
items.description: Calculate earnings directly from quantity multiplied by the rate per unit.
items.examples: Square metres, pieces, tasks or kilometres.

items.title: Fixed price
items.description: Record a task whose agreed amount is entered directly when the work is completed.
items.examples: A repair, installation or one-off service.

record.title: Combine everything you did without losing detail.
record.body: A Work Record groups the activities from one job or working day. Each Work Line keeps its own input, calculation and historical result.

steps.title: Create the record
steps.description: Choose the date and add the context needed for that day.

steps.title: Add multiple activities
steps.description: Mix hours, square metres, completed units and fixed-price work in the same record.

steps.title: Save a reliable history
steps.description: Alveryn stores quantity, time and money results so later configuration changes do not rewrite old work.

analytics.title: See more than totals. See your pattern.
analytics.body: As your history grows, Alveryn turns daily records into a clearer view of time, earnings and workload.

items.title: Weekly rhythm
items.description: See how each day compares with the strongest day and the active week's average.

items.title: Earnings flow
items.description: Follow daily calculated income while keeping zero-activity days out of the worked-day average.

items.title: Period overview
items.description: Review totals and comparisons across the period you select.

items.title: Activity pattern
items.description: Spot stronger and lighter days without reading every record separately.

calendar.title: Your entire working month, in one place.
calendar.body: See work records and configurable absences together, while each day keeps its detailed activities.

final.title: Your work deserves more than a rough estimate.
final.subtitle: Build a clear history of your hours, completed work and earnings from today.

images.dashboardAlt: Alveryn dashboard component showing work records and weekly rhythm.
images.entryAlt: Alveryn work record form with several activities.
images.statisticsAlt: Alveryn overview with time and earnings patterns.
images.calendarAlt: Alveryn calendar component showing work and absences.
